title: Venezuela Earthquakes: Toll Reaches 235 as 46,000 Remain Missing After Twin 7.2 and 7.5 Tremors
summary: Twin earthquakes of 7.2 and 7.5 magnitude struck Venezuela 39 seconds apart, killing at least 235. With 4,300 injured and 46,000 missing, USGS predicts the toll could exceed 10,000 in what may become the worst disaster in Venezuela's modern history.
